positive: A highly stylized, geometric celestial creature composed of constellations and nebulous smoke, floating above an abstract cityscape skyline. The creature should have strong, clean silhouettes and vibrant, glowing internal energy. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, soft lavender, and metallic gold. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, suitable for a striking chest graphic on apparel. Art style should be a mix of neo-retro sci-fi poster art and modern graphic illustration, favoring clean vector lines and strong cosmic contrast. Perfect for print, high detail, UHD, flat graphic design focus.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, low detail, watermarks, text, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, realistic, muted, dull colors
